summary: Frontend-only validation of /inscricao.html for (a) removal of 6 fields from '1 - Dados Pessoais' and (b) fix of the 'Data de Nascimento' float-label overlap bug. All 4 requirements in the review request PASS on the deployed preview URL.

issues: Pre-existing (not in scope of this review): on <select> rows converted to native (e.g. 'Gênero'), the floated label text visually overlaps the selected option text (label 'Gênero' drawn over 'Cisgênero'). The <label> parent correctly gets 'q-field--float' but the native <select>'s vertical padding doesn't push the value down as much as a text input does. Consider padding-top on qs-native selects when the parent has q-field--float.

critical_code_review_comments: inscricao.html line ~181: the fix `if(isDate || focused || filled) lbl.classList.add('q-field--float')` is minimal and correct — keeps date labels always floating so they never overlap the native dd/mm/aaaa placeholder or the entered value.
The file is 295 lines but ~93% is a single minified Quasar CSS blob on line 7. Consider externalising to /assets/quasar.min.css to improve readability, caching and future maintenance (non-blocking).
aplicarFloatLabelGlobal() calls bindFloatLabel(el) which is idempotent (via el.__qsFloatBound). Good.

Minor: consider also passing type=date inputs through the same permanent-float style at CSS level (e.g. `label:has(input[type=date]) { }`) as a defensive fallback if JS fails to bind; current JS-only implementation is fine but tightly coupled to DOMContentLoaded ordering.
seed_data_creation: None. Filled CPF=11144477735, Nome='Fulano de Tal', DOB=1999-01-15, Gênero='Cisgênero' at runtime only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static page /inscricao.html served via CRA public/. All transformations (selects, dates, float labels, CPF mask) are done by inline <script> at end of body on DOMContentLoaded — wait ≥2s after load before assertions. Key facts verified: 23 q-field__label texts remain (6 removed), only 1 input[type=date] on page, DOB parent <label> has classes including 'q-field--float' from load without any focus/interaction, and 'q-field--float' remains after filling to '1999-01-15'. data-testids used: input-cpf, input-cpf-confirme, msg-cpf-invalido, msg-cpf-confirma-invalido.
rca of the issue: N/A — bug was already fixed by main agent. Root cause was Quasar's `.q-field--labeled:not(.q-field--float) .q-field__native::placeholder { color: transparent }` which hides the native placeholder text ONLY when the label is not floating; for input[type=date] browsers render 'dd/mm/aaaa' as a shadow-DOM placeholder that isn't fully suppressed by that rule, so without the float class the Quasar label sits ON TOP of the placeholder/value. Fix: always apply q-field--float when el.type === 'date', regardless of focus/filled state (line 181).
